title: oxalis obtriangulata
intro: Oxalis obtriangulata, also known as the triangular woodsorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Oxalis obtriangulata include its potential to support immune function, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Oxalis obtriangulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
